title: Sunehri Yaadein

title: Filmi Gaane
desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Gaanon ki Daraaz Se
desc: Host Manoj Muntashir, a renowned lyricist and vocalist, plays classic tracks and shares the unknown tales of the beloved songs and artists.

title: Golden Classics
desc: The host revisits and reviews classic Hindi films and their music, before sharing interesting trivia about their making.

title: Is Duniya Ke Sitare
desc: The host engages in a conversation with the popular celebrities of the entertainment industry about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Sansar
desc: After finding out about her pregnancy, Uma decides to go and live with her parents. Upon her return, Uma learns about her broken family and decides to bring them back together.

title: Evergreen Mix
desc: A compilation of the promos of various movies that give an insight into their storylines while providing a behind-the-scenes look at their making.

desc: The host engages in a conversation with the popular celebrities of the entertainment industry about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Bobby
desc: Raja, the son of a rich Hindu businessman, falls in love with Bobby, a poor Catholic girl. Though their families try to keep them away from each other, they strive to be together.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Waqt
desc: An earthquake tears a businessman's family apart. Years later, they reunite in a courtroom trial where the father meets his sons under unprecedented circumstances.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Kudrat
desc: When Chandramukhi visits Shimla, she realises that she was Paro, a girl who is raped and murdered, in her previous life. Thereafter, she decides to punish her culprits and get justice.
